programme.title: Day 1 - Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup
programme.desc: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. The competition features ranking classes, Grand Prix action and decisive Jump-Off rounds, where faults and time determine the winners.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertot

programme.title: Sunderland vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 11
programme.desc: Sunderland are winless in their last 15 Premier League games against Arsenal, since a 1-0 home victory in November 2009. All three of Arsenal’s Premier League defeats against Sunderland have come away from home, and all by a 1-0 scoreline. Indeed, they’ve never conceded more than once in 16 visits to the Black Cats in the competition.

programme.title: Marketa Vondrousova (CZE) vs Ons Jabeur (TUN) - Ladies Singles Final - Mini Matches - Wimbledon 2023
programme.desc: Jabeur and Vondrousova have a 3-3 head-to-head record, with Vondrousova winning both meetings in 2023. Jabeur aims to become the first African Grand Slam singles champion, while Vondrousova is the first unseeded Wimbledon finalist in the Open Era and has previously been a Grand Slam finalist as an unseeded player.

programme.title: Panama vs England - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage

programme.title: Germany vs Curacao - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever encounter between Germany and Curaçao. Germany have won 14 of their last 17 FIFA World Cup matches against teams from the Americas. Germany have won the FIFA World Cup four times, the joint-most for a European nation alongside Italy. Overall, only Brazil have lifted the trophy on more occasions.

programme.title: Netherlands vs Japan - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Netherlands and Japan are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time – their first encounter came in the 2010 group stage, where the Dutch won 1-0 with a goal from Wesley Sneijder. Overall, Japan have never beaten the Netherlands. Japan went unbeaten against European opposition at the last FIFA World Cup, beating Germany and Spain in the gro

programme.title: 2A vs 2B - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Round Of 32
programme.desc: This is just the second ever meeting between South Africa and Canada, with Bafana Bafana winning the other 2-0 in a 2007 friendly in Durban. Canada have lost both of their competitive meetings with African nations, losing 2-0 to Cameroon in the 2001 Confederations Cup, and 2-1 to Morocco in the 2022 FIFA World Cup.

programme.title: Ivory Coast vs Ecuador - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Côte d'Ivoire and Ecuador. Côte d'Ivoire have lost all three of their previous FIFA World Cup matches against teams from CONMEBOL: Argentina in 2006, Brazil in 2010 and Colombia in 2014. programme.title: Sweden vs Tunisia - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first FIFA World Cup encounter between Sweden and Tunisia. Their four previous meetings all came in friendlies, resulting in two Sweden wins, one draw and one Tunisia victory. programme.title: Spain vs Cape Verde - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first ever meeting between Spain and Cabo Verde. Nigeria are the only CAF team to beat Spain at the FIFA World Cup, in the group stages of the 1998 edition. Their last two encounters with African opposition were both against Morocco, with both ending in draws.

programme.title: Belgium vs Egypt - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Belgium and Egypt will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their four previous encounters were all friendlies, with Egypt winning three and Belgium one. Belgium and Egypt’s last encounter came in a November 2022 friendly – Egypt won 2-1 in Kuwait City.

programme.title: Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Saudi Arabia and Uruguay are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. Their first encounter came in the 2018 group stage, where Uruguay won 1-0 with a goal from Luis Suárez. Saudi Arabia have a balanced FIFA World Cup record against CONMEBOL teams, with one win and one defeat.

programme.title: Iran vs New Zealand - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Iran and New Zealand will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their two previous encounters ended in a 0-0 draw and a 3-0 win for Iran. This will be Iran’s seventh appearance at the FIFA World Cup. programme.title: France vs Senegal - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: France and Senegal are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. programme.title: Algeria vs Austria - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Algeria and Austria’s only previous encounter was in the group stage of the 1982 FIFA World Cup – Austria won 2-0, which was their last clean sheet at the tournament. programme.title: Colombia vs Portugal - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage

programme.title: Panama vs England - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Panama and England’s only previous encounter was in the group stage of the 2018 FIFA World Cup – England won 6-1, their largest World Cup victory to date. England’s only defeat against a CONCACAF nation at the FIFA World Cup came in 1950 against the USA. Since then, they have three wins and three draws.

programme.title: Egypt vs Iran - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Egypt and Iran are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the first time. Their only previous encounter came in a June 2000 LG Cup match in Tehran – the game ended 1-1, with Egypt winning 8-7 on penalties. The game saw current Egypt head coach Hossam Hassan open the scoring whilst Iran all-time top scorer Ali Daei equalized. Iran are unbeaten against Af

programme.title: Uruguay vs Spain - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Uruguay and Spain are facing each other at the FIFA World Cup for the third time – their two previous meetings both ended in draws. Uruguay have tasted victory in just one of their last nine FIFA World Cup matches played on Mexican soil : a 1-0 extra-time win over the USSR in the 1970 quarter-finals.
